germination_tips:
• Keep grow media consistently moist but not saturated.
• Maintain 65–75°F (18–24°C).
• Use a humidity dome to improve germination rates.
• Provide gentle light until sprouts emerge.
seedling_tips:
• Provide 14–16 hours of light daily.
• Maintain moderate humidity and airflow.
• Keep roots moist but avoid waterlogging.
• Begin light feeding once true leaves appear.
vegetative_tips:
• Maintain steady nutrient levels and pH.
• Harvest regularly to encourage new growth.
• Ensure good airflow around foliage.
• Remove damaged or yellowing leaves promptly.
harvest_tips:
• Harvest outer leaves first
• Never remove more than 1/3 of plant
example_plants: Basil, Parsley, Chives, Rosemary, Peppermint, Lemon Balm, Catnip

germination_tips:
• Keep grow media evenly moist throughout germination.
• Maintain 60–75°F (16–24°C).
• Provide gentle light after emergence.
• Avoid excessive heat during germination."
seedling_tips:
• Provide 12–14 hours of light daily.
• Maintain steady moisture and airflow.
• Thin crowded seedlings if necessary.
• Begin balanced nutrients after true leaves develop."
vegetative_tips:
• Maintain cool temperatures when possible.
• Monitor nutrient levels to support rapid leaf growth.
• Remove damaged leaves regularly.
• Prevent overcrowding to improve airflow."
harvest_tips:
• Harvest outer leaves first for continuous production.
• Harvest entire heads when mature if desired.
• Harvest before plants begin bolting.
• Regular harvesting promotes continued growth."
example_plants: Lettuce, Kale, Swiss Chard, Pak Choi, Mustard, Arugula, Endive, Collards, Amaranth

germination_tips:
"• Maintain 70–80°F (21–27°C) for best germination.
• Keep media consistently moist.
• Use humidity domes to retain moisture.
• Provide warmth for uniform sprouting."
seedling_tips:
"• Provide 14–16 hours of strong light daily.• Ensure good airflow to strengthen stems.
• Begin balanced feeding after true leaves appear.
• Avoid temperature fluctuations."
vegetative_tips:
"• Increase nutrient availability as plants grow.
• Support plants with stakes, clips, or trellises.
• Maintain consistent watering and pH.
• Remove unhealthy foliage and monitor flowering."
harvest_tips:
"• Harvest fruits when fully developed and properly colored.
• Pick regularly to encourage continued production.
• Support heavy fruit clusters when needed.
• Handle fruits carefully to avoid bruising."

germination_tips:
"• Keep media evenly moist during germination.
• Maintain 55–75°F (13–24°C).
• Avoid drying out the root zone.
• Ensure adequate depth for root development."
seedling_tips:
"• Provide strong light immediately after emergence.
• Avoid disturbing developing roots.
• Maintain steady moisture levels.
• Monitor spacing to prevent crowding."
vegetative_tips:
"• Maintain consistent nutrient and moisture levels.
• Avoid rapid environmental fluctuations.
• Support healthy root expansion with adequate space.
• Remove weak or crowded plants if necessary."
harvest_tips:
"• Harvest promptly when roots reach desired size.
• Delayed harvest may reduce quality.
• Remove media carefully when harvesting.
• Store harvested roots in a cool environment."

germination_tips:
"• Maintain 65–80°F (18–27°C).
• Keep media moist until emergence.
• Provide bright indirect light after sprouting.
• Ensure adequate humidity during germination."
seedling_tips:
"• Provide 14–16 hours of light daily.
• Maintain balanced moisture and airflow.
• Avoid overfeeding young seedlings.
• Promote strong stem development with airflow."
vegetative_tips:
"• Maintain balanced nutrients for foliage and blooms.
• Remove damaged leaves and spent flowers when appropriate.
• Ensure adequate light intensity.
• Support taller varieties if necessary."
harvest_tips:
"• Harvest blooms at peak appearance.
• Remove spent flowers to encourage additional blooming when applicable.
• Handle flowers carefully to avoid damage.
• Harvest during cooler periods of the day when possible."

germination_tips:
"• Keep media evenly moist during germination.
• Maintain 60–75°F (16–24°C).
• Ensure adequate oxygen around developing roots.
• Avoid excessive moisture buildup."
seedling_tips:
"• Provide 12–16 hours of light daily.
• Begin balanced feeding after true leaves appear.
• Provide support for climbing varieties early.
• Maintain steady moisture."
vegetative_tips:
"• Install trellises or supports before vigorous growth begins.
• Maintain consistent nutrients and pH.
• Encourage airflow around foliage.
• Monitor pod development closely."
harvest_tips:
"• Harvest pods regularly to encourage continued production.
• Pick pods at preferred maturity stage.
• Avoid damaging stems during harvest.
• Frequent harvesting improves overall yield."
